signals.headline: Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launches on Solana Network** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][3][4][7]
signals.raw:
Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launches on Solana Network** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][3][4][7]

XRP has officially debuted as wrapped wXRP on Solana, enabling DeFi access (trading, lending, liquidity pools) on platforms like Jupiter, Phantom, Titan Exchange, and Meteora, backed 1:1 by native XRP in institutional custody via Hex Trust and LayerZero, with over $100M initial liquidity[1][3][4][7][9].
